old: 看病的费很高。
reason: Unnatural phrasing: 费 alone cannot stand as a noun meaning 'fee' in modern Chinese without a modifier or compound. Should use 费用.

old: Medical fees are very high.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 快走，否则会迟到。
reason: Near-duplicate of sentence_1 ('快点儿，否则要迟到了。') within the same row — same scenario (running late). Replace with a distinct context.

old: Leave quickly, otherwise you'll be late.
new: Study seriously, otherwise things will go badly.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 教室里有三幅照片。
new: 他送给我一幅很美的画。
reason: 幅 is used for paintings and similar artwork, not photographs (照片 takes 张). Wrong definition illustrated. Replaced with a sentence using 幅 + 画.

old: 他送给我一幅很美的画。
reason: After moving the sentence_2 content to sentence_3, sentence_2 needs a distinct replacement.

old: He gave me a very beautiful painting.
new: A painting is hanging on the wall.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence_2.

old: There are three pictures in the classroom.
new: He gave me a very beautiful painting.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence_3.

old: 他忘记付水电费了。
reason: 水电费 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 房租 which is in vocab.

old: He forgot to pay the utilities bill.
new: He forgot to pay the rent.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 复印机在哪里？
reason: 复印机 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with a sentence using only in-vocab words.

old: Where is the photocopier?
new: How many copies of this document need to be photocopied?
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 我跑了很久才赶上公共汽车。
new: 我跑了很久才赶上公交车。
reason: 公共汽车 is not in vocab_upto_L4; 公交车 is (line 269).

old: I ran for a long time before catching up with the bus.
new: I ran for a long time before catching up with the bus.
reason: Translation unchanged; meaning is the same.

old: 他们的故事让人感动落泪。
new: 他们的故事真的很感人。
reason: Target word 感人 is absent from sentence_3; 感动 was used instead. Also 落泪 is not in vocab.

old: Their story is so moving it brings tears.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 很多学生努力备考高考。
new: 很多学生努力准备高考。
reason: 备考 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 准备 which is in vocab.

old: Many students work hard to prepare for the college entrance examination.
new: Many students work hard to prepare for the college entrance examination.
reason: Translation unchanged; meaning is the same.

old: 中共成立于一九二一年。
new: 他在学习共产党的历史。
reason: 成立 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Also 中共 is an abbreviation not in vocab. New sentence uses only in-vocab words and still illustrates 共 as abbreviation for 共产党.

old: The Communist Party of China was established in 1921.
new: He is studying the history of the Communist Party.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 共的历史很长。
reason: Unnatural phrasing: 共 cannot stand alone as a noun referring to the Communist Party in natural Chinese. Replaced with clearer phrasing.

old: The Communist Party has a long history.
new: The Communist Party is very important to China.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 他在学习共的历史。
new: 他对共产党的历史很了解。
reason: Unnatural phrasing: 共 alone does not serve as a standalone abbreviation noun in spoken Chinese. Corrected to natural phrasing.

old: He is studying the history of the Communist Party.
new: He knows the history of the Communist Party very well.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 顾客就是上帝。
reason: 上帝 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced sentence.

old: 这位顾客很满意。
reason: After moving former sentence_2 to sentence_1, sentence_2 updated for variety.

old: The customer is always right.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence_1.

old: This customer is very satisfied.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence_2.

old: 一挂鞭炮响了。
reason: 鞭炮 is not in vocab_upto_L4. However 挂 as a measure word for strings is inherently tied to firecrackers in this definition — there are no in-vocab items that naturally take 挂 as a measure word. Replace with a sentence that uses 挂 naturally in context while avoiding out-of-vocab nouns.

old: A string of firecrackers went off.
new: He bought two strings of things.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 他买了两挂鞭炮。
reason: 鞭炮 is not in vocab_upto_L4.

old: He bought two strings of firecrackers.
new: They set off a string during the New Year.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 过年时放了一挂鞭炮。
reason: 鞭炮 is not in vocab_upto_L4.

old: They set off a string of firecrackers during the New Year.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 门的关键坏了。
reason: Unnatural phrasing: 门的关键 should be 门上的关键 for natural Chinese grammar in this context.

old: The door bolt is broken.
new: The bolt on the door is broken.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 这根管很细。

old: 那根管坏了。
reason: 根 as a measure word is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced 根 with 个.

old: 煤气管不能坏。
reason: 煤气 is not in vocab_upto_L4.

old: The gas pipe must not be broken.
new: This pipe must not be broken.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 这盏灯照亮了很暗的房间。
reason: 盏 is not in vocab_upto_L4; 照亮 is not in vocab_upto_L4; 暗 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Also target word 光 is absent. Replaced with a sentence using only in-vocab words that illustrates 光 as illumination.

old: This lamp lit up the very dark room.
new: The illumination from this lamp is very bright.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence.

old: 这盏灯的光很亮。
reason: 盏 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with in-vocab sentence. Former sentence_3 (月亮的光很美) is moved to become a replacement for sentence_2.

old: The illumination from this lamp is very bright.
new: The illumination of the moon is very beautiful.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence_2.

old: 月亮的光很美。
reason: Sentence_3 needs a new sentence after former sentence_3 was moved to sentence_2.

old: The illumination of the moon is very beautiful.
new: The illumination in the room is very good.
reason: Translation updated to match corrected sentence_3.

old: 电台每天广播新闻。
reason: 电台 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 他们.

old: The radio station broadcasts the news every day.
new: They broadcast the news every day.

old: 她会说好几种国际语言。
reason: 好几 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with a sentence using only in-vocab words.

old: She can speak several international languages.

old: 运动后浑身是汗。
reason: 浑身 is not in vocab_upto_L4. Replaced with 全身 which is in vocab (line 265).
